reasoning_summary: The clip shows a person walking with alternating grounded steps. The motion is generally consistent with a natural gait, but there are minor issues with arm swing amplitude, leg lift height, hip sway, shoulder sway, head bounce, root motion drift, stance width variation, and temporal jitter. The following adjustments will improve readability while preserving the walking intent and keeping the legs below the hips, maintaining ground contact, and avoiding airborne poses.
reasoning_actions: Increase arm swing amplitude for clearer rhythm
Reduce leg lift to keep knees lower and maintain grounded steps
Add subtle hip sway to enhance torso motion
Introduce gentle shoulder sway for better upper body dynamics
Dampen head bounce for smoother head motion
Stabilize root motion to prevent drift
Normalize stance width for consistent foot placement
Apply temporal smoothing to reduce jitter
